feature_tested: Department Dashboards (Culinary, Pastry, F&B Director, Events), Engineering Advanced (Room Matrix, Escalations, Inspections, Contractors), Push Notifications, Voice Integration (ElevenLabs)
summary: All 14 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified My Department panel with 4 tabs (Culinary, Pastry, F&B Director, Events) and Engineering Ops panel with 5 tabs (Overview, Work Orders, Equipment, PM Schedule, New Work Order). All features working correctly.

endpoints: GET /api/dept-dash/culinary - Returns food_cost_pct 20.9%, waste_pct 1.11%, 26 menu items, waste_breakdown, recent_deliveries
GET /api/dept-dash/pastry - Returns 4 outlets_served, 4 commissary_configs, wedding_pipeline, dessert items
GET /api/dept-dash/fb-director - Returns outlet_summary, 10+ beverage_program items, EBITDA, labor_pct
GET /api/dept-dash/events - Returns 18 total_events, $241,350 revenue, pipeline stages, event_types
GET /api/engineering/advanced/contractors - Returns 6 contractors with specialties (hvac, elevator, plumbing, electrical, fire_safety, pool) and hourly rates
POST /api/engineering/advanced/check-escalations - Checks for overdue work orders based on priority thresholds
POST /api/engineering/advanced/inspection - Creates inspection checklist with pass/fail counts
GET /api/engineering/advanced/room-matrix - Returns room maintenance status with open/critical issues
POST /api/notifications/send - Queues notification for delivery (uses enterprise.py API with recipient_id)
GET /api/notifications/user/usr-mgr-001 - Returns notifications for user with unread count
POST /api/notifications/generate-alerts - Generates smart alerts from current data (food cost, labor, purchases)
POST /api/voice/tts - Returns expected key_upgrade_needed error (ElevenLabs free tier blocked in cloud)
GET /api/voice/voices - Returns voices list or error about key

verified_elements: App loads successfully without errors
Sidebar visible with all menu items
My Department button clickable in sidebar
My Department panel opens correctly
Culinary tab shows: Food Cost 20.9%, Waste 1.11%, Kitchen Labor $65,464, 26 Menu Items
Culinary tab shows Menu Mix with top items, Recent Deliveries, Waste Breakdown
Pastry tab accessible and loads data
F&B Director tab accessible and loads data
Events tab shows: 18 Total Events, $241,350 Revenue, 2,780 Total Guests, 57 On Calendar
Events tab shows BEO Pipeline stages and Event Types
Engineering Ops button clickable in sidebar
Engineering Ops panel opens correctly
ENGINEERING OPERATIONS header visible
KPIs: Open 7, In Progress 0, Critical 1, Completed 0, Equipment 10
Tabs: Overview, Work Orders (7), Equipment (10), PM Schedule (10 due), New Work Order
Recent Work Orders list shows Room 305, Crystal Ballroom, Pool Deck, Room 412
PM Due Soon shows 10 items (refrigeration, kitchen, hvac, pool, elevator)
Work order priorities displayed (HIGH, MEDIUM, LOW)
Work order statuses displayed (OPEN)
PM status badges showing DUE_SOON

critical_code_review_comments: Department dashboards correctly aggregate data from multiple collections (pos_transactions, gl_entries, waste_tracking, invoices, labor_schedules)
Culinary dashboard shows 26 menu items with food cost trending and waste breakdown
Pastry commissary configured for 4 outlets (Central Kitchen as producer)
Events dashboard shows 18 BEO events with $241,350 total revenue
Engineering advanced features include room matrix, auto-escalation, inspections, and contractor management
Push notification framework uses enterprise.py API (recipient_id field) - stores in both notification_queue and notifications collections
ElevenLabs voice integration returns expected key_upgrade_needed error in cloud environment (free tier limitation)
Note: There are two notification systems - enterprise.py (/api/notifications/send with recipient_id) and push_notifications.py (same route but different schema)
seed_data_creation: Engineering contractors auto-seeded on first request (6 contractors: HVAC Pro Services, Elite Elevator Corp, Miami Fire Safety Inc, Coastal Plumbing, PowerGrid Electric, Pool Masters LLC)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 66 features working correctly. Department dashboards (Culinary, Pastry, F&B Director, Events) accessible via My Department panel in sidebar. Engineering Ops panel shows work orders, equipment, PM schedules. Push notifications use enterprise.py API with recipient_id field. ElevenLabs TTS returns key_upgrade_needed error (expected - free tier blocked in cloud). Previous iterations 59-65 all passed 100%.

mocked_apis.ElevenLabs TTS: Returns key_upgrade_needed error (free tier blocked in cloud environment)
